# Decomp roadmap

_Last updated: 2026-05-22 19:06 UTC_  _Scope: full project_

## Strategy

Pipeline-validation phase is **half-done**: the upstream-mirror path (libultra+libkmc verbatim copies, codified now in `/decomp-libupstream`) is proven by two end-to-end wins — `__osViGetCurrentContext` and `_matherr`. The classical match-loop path (m2c → KMC GCC → asm-differ → permuter, driven by `/decomp`) is still **unproven** — every existing match took the upstream-mirror shortcut. Highest-ROI next move is to fan out `/decomp-libupstream` across the dense libultra/libkmc band at `0x800AB000–0x800B3E40` (ROM `0x869E0–0x8F250`) while burning down at least one `/decomp` target in parallel so the match-loop path is also validated before we commit to the wider game-side code. Ghidra already supplies curated names for most libultra leaves in this band (`osAfterPreNMI`, `osGetThreadPri`, `__osSiDeviceBusy`, `__osSpSetStatus`, …); upstream sources exist for nearly every one of them in `~/development/repos/libultra_modern/src/` and `~/development/repos/libkmc/src/`. After the first ~10 libultra/libkmc leaves land file-level md5 wins, recurse outward: libnusys (`0x80099XXX`) breadth-first, then game-side leaves under `mainproc` once Ghidra's call-graph for the game side is warmer.

## Next 5 targets

1. `osAfterPreNMI` (ROM `0x8AC80`, VRAM `0x800AF880`, ~8 instrs, libultra/system). Rationale: `/decomp-libupstream` — upstream at `libultra_modern/src/shared/system/afterprenmi.c`; calls only `__osSpSetPc` (also a libultra leaf, queued); Ghidra-named.
2. `osGetThreadPri` (ROM `0x877B0`, VRAM `0x800AC1B0`, ~8 instrs, libultra/pi). Rationale: `/decomp-libupstream` — upstream at `libultra_modern/src/nintendo/pi/pimgr.c` (multi-function file; copy just this one). Zero callees. Ghidra-named.
3. `__osSiDeviceBusy` (ROM `0x8DF30`, VRAM `0x800B2B30`, ~8 instrs, libultra/si). Rationale: `/decomp-libupstream` — upstream at `libultra_modern/src/monegi/si/si.c`. Zero callees. Sets precedent for the dense SI/SP/DP busy-poll family (`__osSpDeviceBusy`, `__osSpSetStatus`, `__osSiRawReadIo`, `__osSiRawWriteIo`).
4. `rand` (ROM `0x8E620`, VRAM `0x800B3220`, ~13 instrs, libkmc). Rationale: `/decomp-libupstream` — upstream at `libkmc/src/rand.c`; validates the libkmc upstream-mirror pattern beyond `_matherr` (which was a one-line `return 0;`). `srand` ships in the same file — both flip together.
5. `func_800B09F0` (ROM `0x8BDF0`, VRAM `0x800B09F0`, ~9 instrs, custom). Rationale: **`/decomp` (not `-libupstream`)** — reads `AI_STATUS_REG`, no known upstream. Pipeline validation: this is the smallest non-trivial leaf with no upstream shortcut, so completing it proves the m2c → KMC → asm-differ loop end-to-end. Pairs naturally with `hardware_regs.txt` work.

## Subsegments to flip (`asm` → `c`)

Cohesive one-function leaf subsegments ready to open. User-action: flip `[<offset>, asm]` → `[<offset>, c, <path>]` in `mariogolf64.yaml` and `make extract`. The first 5 line up with the picks above; the rest are the next wave once `/decomp-libupstream` is grooved.

- `0x8AC80` — `osAfterPreNMI` → `libultra/system/afterprenmi`. Pick 1.
- `0x877B0` — `osGetThreadPri` → `libultra/pi/pimgr_getpri` (singleton subset of pimgr.c).
- `0x8DF30` — `__osSiDeviceBusy` → `libultra/si/sidevicebusy` (singleton subset of si.c).
- `0x8E620` — `rand` → `libkmc/rand` (carries `srand`).
- `0x8BDF0` — `func_800B09F0` → custom path under `src/` (no upstream). Pick 5.
- `0x869E0` — `__osSpSetStatus` → `libultra/rsp/spsetstat`. Sibling of pick 3 family.
- `0x8DF10` — `func_800B2B10` (DPC status busy, awaiting Ghidra name) → `libultra/rdp/dpdevicebusy` (upstream `dp.c`). Sibling cluster with `__osSiDeviceBusy`.
- `0x8E550` — `memset` → `libkmc/memset`. Trivial libkmc leaf.
- `0x8EAD0` — `strcmp` → `libkmc/strcmp`. Trivial libkmc leaf.
- `0x8E110` — `_xatan` → `libkmc/atan` (multi-function file; carries `atan`, `atan2`).
- `0x8BE10` — `func_800B0A10` (sqrtf wrapper, 5 instrs, no libkmc upstream). `/decomp` candidate after pick 5 grooves the loop.
- `0xADD30` — `func_ovl0_801F4A30` (1-instr ovl0 nop stub). Per-overlay flip; un-blocks 7 sibling overlays once one lands.
